minorBonus: +1 block the first time you play an attack each round.
majorBonus: After you deal damage once per round, apply Marked 1.
hugeBonus: At the start of each survivor turn, choose +1 damage this turn or Dodge 1.
specialAbilityCardEffect: Deal 4 damage. Apply Marked 2. If you already have Dodge, draw 1 then discard 1.
implementationRule: Bonuses are granted by number of matching set pieces currently equipped. Complete bonus also injects the special ability card while the full set remains equipped.

minorBonus: The first incoming attack each round loses 1 damage.
majorBonus: When you play a Counter, gain Dodge 1 after it resolves.
hugeBonus: Once per battle, ignore the first Bleed, Poison, Burn or Doom you would gain.
specialAbilityCardEffect: Cancel 2 incoming damage. Move 1 space. Your next attack this round gains +1 damage.
implementationRule: Bonuses are granted by number of matching set pieces currently equipped. Complete bonus also injects the special ability card while the full set remains equipped.

minorBonus: When you draw a support card, gain Guarded 1.
majorBonus: Your first support card each round costs 1 less, minimum 0.
hugeBonus: When you would gain Panic, reduce it by 1 and give an adjacent ally Guarded 1.
specialAbilityCardEffect: Heal 1 wound from yourself or an adjacent ally. Then gain Guarded 2.
implementationRule: Bonuses are granted by number of matching set pieces currently equipped. Complete bonus also injects the special ability card while the full set remains equipped.

minorBonus: After you move 2 or more spaces, gain +1 block until the next quarry action.
majorBonus: The first ranged or reach attack you play each round gains +1 damage.
hugeBonus: Once per round after moving, you may cleanse Snared 1 or Exposed 1 from yourself.
specialAbilityCardEffect: Move up to 3 spaces. Gain Dodge 1. Your next attack this turn applies Exposed 1.
implementationRule: Bonuses are granted by number of matching set pieces currently equipped. Complete bonus also injects the special ability card while the full set remains equipped.

minorBonus: When you apply Burn, increase that Burn by 1 once per round.
majorBonus: At the end of your turn, if you dealt damage, gain Guarded 1.
hugeBonus: Your first attack against a Burning target each round gains +2 damage.
specialAbilityCardEffect: Deal 5 damage. Apply Burn 3. If the target already has Burn, gain Guarded 2.
